decision_rules: Prefer a next gate that can be inspected without new PDF downloads.
Prefer preserving a real observed failure before claiming parser quality.
Prefer a gate that reduces a robust-PDF blocker while staying small.
Deprioritize gates requiring outside reviewer feedback because they cannot be self-completed.
Deprioritize gates blocked by source access until an alternate policy-reviewed fixture exists.

reviewed_gaps.current_evidence: EIA PyMuPDF text/block metadata exists, but rendered page comparison does not.
reviewed_gaps.missing_quality_evidence: Rendered page comparison, visual-fidelity pass criteria, and expected visual anchors are still missing.
reviewed_gaps.decision_reason: needs visual ground-truth design before runtime comparison
reviewed_gaps.boundary: ground-truth planning route only; not robust PDF extraction evidence

reviewed_gaps.current_evidence: BEA PyMuPDF text/block metadata exists, but labeled layout ground truth does not.
reviewed_gaps.missing_quality_evidence: Labeled layout anchors, reading-order expectations, and comparison criteria are still missing.
reviewed_gaps.decision_reason: needs layout ground-truth design before parser quality wording
reviewed_gaps.boundary: ground-truth planning route only; not robust PDF extraction evidence

reviewed_gaps.current_evidence: NARA PyMuPDF digital-text extraction observed 4 empty pages and 0 text characters; OCR was not attempted.
reviewed_gaps.missing_quality_evidence: The no-native-text failure candidate must be preserved as a route before OCR quality work.
reviewed_gaps.decision_reason: real observed no-native-text failure can be preserved before OCR quality work
reviewed_gaps.boundary: failure-route selection only; not robust PDF extraction evidence

reviewed_gaps.current_evidence: BLS candidate remains HTTP 403 from the download/hash gate.
reviewed_gaps.missing_quality_evidence: Source-access route or alternate policy-reviewed reading-order fixture is still missing.
reviewed_gaps.decision_reason: blocked by source access before reading-order quality can be inspected
reviewed_gaps.boundary: blocked source route only; not robust PDF extraction evidence

reviewed_gaps.current_evidence: BLS image/chart candidate remains HTTP 403 from the download/hash gate.
reviewed_gaps.missing_quality_evidence: Source-access route or alternate policy-reviewed image/chart fixture is still missing.
reviewed_gaps.decision_reason: blocked by source access before image/chart evidence can be inspected
reviewed_gaps.boundary: blocked source route only; not robust PDF extraction evidence

reviewed_gaps.current_evidence: External review route exists, but no qualifying non-owner reviewer feedback has been accepted.
reviewed_gaps.missing_quality_evidence: Qualifying outside reviewer comment and screening result are still missing.
reviewed_gaps.decision_reason: cannot be self-completed by a local product gate
reviewed_gaps.boundary: external route only; not robust PDF extraction evidence

minimum_next_evidence: Create a no-native-text failure route from the existing NARA failure candidate without running OCR.
Keep the route separate from OCR quality evidence.
Do not claim robust PDF extraction until OCR quality, visual fidelity, layout ground truth, reading order, image/chart interpretation, and external validation are separately evidenced.
warnings: This review is over the existing quality matrix and does not add runtime evidence.
The selected next gate preserves a failure route; it does not implement OCR.
External reviewer validation cannot be self-completed by this gate.
boundary_notes: source-policy PDF quality gap review only
does not add new runtime evidence
